titleStmt.title: SII 16.310: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 310. (A.R. No. 67 of 1915.) CHINNA AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up to the right of the entrance into the kañchuguṁbha-gōpuram of the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1531, Saumya, Jyēshṭha ba. 10, Friday corresponding to 1609 A.D., June 16.

It registers the gift of seven gold-gilded pinnacles, two fly whisks and a white silk umbrella to the god Ahōbala at Diguva Tirupati by Mādiśeṭṭi-Rudrayya and others for the merit of the 150 nagarasvāmins who bear among others the title Penugoṇḍapuravarādhīśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayādbudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1541 Agunēṭi
saumya saṁvatsara jēṣṭha ba 10 śukravāraṁ śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraveṁkaṭapatirāyadēvamahārāyalaya
vāru penugoṁḍa nagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛthivisāṁmrā
jyamu cēyucuṁḍagānu svastiśrī catu¨rbhuvanādhīśvara śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi bra
hmāṁḍanāyakulaina śrī Ahōbala vīranārasiṁhvadēvuni divyaśrīcaraṇāraviṁdaṁ
ṁbulaku svāmivāri dāsānadāsulu svasti samasta Ādipraśasti sahitulaina saka
ḷaguṇasaṁpanulaina śrīnagarēśvara śrījanā¨rdanadēvara divyaśrīpādapadmā
rādhakulaina vāsavakaṁnyakāvarakṛpānityulaina śrībhāskarācārya Āsi¨rrāda kṛ
pākaṭākṣaṁbuna putrapautrābhivaṁtulaina penugoṁḍapuravarādhīśvarulaina
gōka¨rnasamudbhuvulaina saptasaṁtānādhīśvaruluṁnu ṣōḍaśamahādānavinō
duluṁnu satyaharicaṁdṟluṁnu vā[¨r*]ttikadha¨rmanilayuluṁnu nityadānaci
ṁtāmaṇulaina stitāśēṣa nūṭayēbaṁḍṛ nagarasvāmulakuṁnu puṁṇyaṁgā
nu mādiśeṭi liṁgayakomāruṁḍu rudraya daṁḍaṁ sama¨rpiṁci kulaṁvā
riki viṁnnapaṁcēśi śrī Ahōbalēśvarula diguvatirupatini peddagōpurānaku
baṁgāru jalapoṁta kaḷaśālu Ēḍuṁnnu viṁjāmaralu reṁḍuṁnnu
goḍugu vagaṭini sama¨rpiṁcina vivaraṁ . Āravīṭi canamaśeṭi komā
ruṁḍu kriṣṇamaśeṭini Ā sēṣādri komāruṁḍu raṁgayānu jana I
darunu sama¨rpiṁcina kaḷaśaṁ 1 viṁjāmaralu 2 kaḷaśaṁtō tellapaṭu
goḍugu 1 vilūri veṁkaṭaśeṭi komāruṁḍu tiṁmapa kaḷeśaṁ
1 pōlā mallaya komāruṁḍu lakṣumaya kaḷaśaṁ 1 dēviśe
ṭi maliseṭi kumāruṁḍu pōtamaseṭi kaḷaśaṁ 1 rācamaḍugu liṁ
gaya kumāruṁḍu saruvaya kaḷaśaṁ 1 mādiseṭṭi tippaya ku
māruṁḍu pāpaya kaḷaśaṁ 1 mādiseṭṭi jaṁnnaya kumāruṁḍu
liṁggiseṭi kaḷaśaṁ 1 Āṁttu bhaṁgāru jalapoṁtta kaḷaśālu
yēḍu 7 nnu viṁjāmarālu 2 nu tella paṭṭu goḍugu kaḷaśaṁ
1 nni sama¨rpiṁcināru ganaka yī dharmaṁ Ācaṁdrākkan®stā
Igā Avadhavaṁcunu . 0 . śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.310 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
